<!-- Before / After screenshots or screen recordings -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles with no warnings (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] Coverage meets or exceeds repo minimum (60 %)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Formatting passes (`pnpm format:check`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or internal URLs in code or comments
- [ ] Public functions have JSDoc with `@param`, `@return`, and `@example`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] New dependencies justified: what it does, why we need it, alternatives considered, licence (MIT/Apache 2.0)
- [ ] `pnpm audit` shows no new critical or high vulnerabilities
- [ ] Reviewed through the lens of relevant [personas](https://github.com/multicorn-ai/multicorn-learn/blob/main/.cursor/rules/multicorn.mdc): Security Auditor (Jordan), Contributor (Priya), Acquirer (The Team)
